description_long: This object depicts a modern suburban neighborhood block with multiple detached houses arranged along a central road. The houses feature flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and black facades, with some wood and green landscaping elements. Each house has a unique layout, with visible driveways, garages, and backyard amenities such as swimming pools and patios. The road bisects the scene, providing access to each property, and sidewalks or pathways connect the homes. The architectural style is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The overall layout suggests a planned residential community with a focus on privacy and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern residential block with several flat-roofed, contemporary houses arranged along a central road, featuring large windows, driveways, and landscaped yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facades of the houses, the central road, and the main entrances with driveways and garages.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the properties, backyard pools, patios, and landscaping behind the houses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the houses, including garages, patios, and additional outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the rear landscaping, pools, and the alignment of houses along the road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small overhangs or porches, and direct access from driveways; minimal decorative elements.
